caption: The video captures a churning body of dark blue water with turbulent white foam and waves. The water is in constant motion, swirling and crashing to create frothy whitecaps and bubbles that shift across the surface. No people, clothing, or physical objects are visible in the water. In the upper right corner of each shot, there is a small red circular logo containing the white text "13". As the sequence progresses, the patterns of the white foam and the peaks of the waves evolve, moving and undulating across the frame, while the overall composition of the turbulent sea remains the same.
